segments.text: Yahweh said to Moses,
Speak to the priests, the sons of Aaron, and say to them, ‘A priest shall not defile himself for the dead among his people,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: except for his relatives that are near to him: for his mother, for his father, for his son, for his daughter, for his brother,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: and for his virgin sister who is near to him, who has had no husband; for her he may defile himself.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He shall not defile himself, being a chief man among his people, to profane himself.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “‘They shall not shave their heads or shave off the corners of their beards or make any cuttings in their flesh.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: They shall be holy to their God, and not profane the name of their God, for they offer the offerings of Yahweh made by fire, the bread of their God. Therefore they shall be holy.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “‘They shall not marry a woman who is a prostitute, or profane. A priest shall not marry a woman divorced from her husband; for he is holy to his God.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Therefore you shall sanctify him, for he offers the bread of your God. He shall be holy to you, for I Yahweh, who sanctify you, am holy.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “‘The daughter of any priest, if she profanes herself by playing the prostitute, she profanes her father. She shall be burned with fire.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “‘He who is the high priest among his brothers, upon whose head the anointing oil is poured, and who is consecrated to put on the garments, shall not let the hair of his head hang loose, or tear his clothes.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He must not go in to any dead body, or defile himself for his father or for his mother.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He shall not go out of the sanctuary, nor profane the sanctuary of his God; for the crown of the anointing oil of his God is upon him. I am Yahweh.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “‘He shall take a wife in her virginity.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He shall not marry a widow, or one divorced, or a woman who has been defiled, or a prostitute. He shall take a virgin of his own people as a wife.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He shall not profane his offspring among his people, for I am Yahweh who sanctifies him.’
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Yahweh spoke to Moses, saying,
Say to Aaron, ‘None of your offspring throughout their generations who has a defect may approach to offer the bread of his God.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For whatever man he is that has a defect, he shall not draw near: a blind man, or a lame, or he who has a flat nose, or any deformity,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: or a man who has an injured foot, or an injured hand,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: or hunchbacked, or a dwarf, or one who has a defect in his eye, or an itching disease, or scabs, or who has damaged testicles.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: No man of the offspring of Aaron the priest who has a defect shall come near to offer the offerings of Yahweh made by fire. Since he has a defect, he shall not come near to offer the bread of his God.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He shall eat the bread of his God, both of the most holy, and of the holy.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He shall not come near to the veil, nor come near to the altar, because he has a defect; that he may not profane my sanctuaries, for I am Yahweh who sanctifies them.’
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: So Moses spoke to Aaron, and to his sons, and to all the children of Israel.
